content: Wine/Proton does NOT abstract the filesystem: Windows fopen maps directly to Linux open, so case mismatches (mod ships TEXTURES/, game expects Textures/) cause file-not-found and crashes on case-sensitive ext4/btrfs. Fix: ext4 casefold (mkfs -O casefold + chattr +F dir) or tmpfs case-insensitive (Linux 6.13). Wine's own case-insensitive lookup is slower. Per-directory attribute, must be set before files written and on empty dir.
